title: Blueprint Swarm - Churn Synthesis
description: Cross-account churn analysis synthesizing patterns, warning signals, and preventability across the entire dataset

reason.description: Top-level churn reason category (e.g., 'Product Gap', 'Champion Loss', 'Pricing', 'Poor Onboarding', 'Competitive Displacement')

frequency.description: Number of accounts that churned for this reason

pct_of_churn.description: Percentage of total churn attributed to this reason

revenue_impact.description: Total ARR lost to this churn reason (null if revenue data unavailable)

name.description: Specific sub-category (e.g., under 'Product Gap': 'Missing reporting features', 'No API integration')

count.description: Number of accounts in this sub-category

example_quotes.description: Verbatim quotes from calls that illustrate this sub-category

sub_categories.description: Specific sub-reasons within this top-level category

churn_taxonomy.description: Taxonomy of churn reasons ranked by frequency and impact

signal.description: Description of the warning signal pattern observed across accounts

lead_time_avg_days.description: Average number of days before churn that this signal appears

frequency.description: Number of churned accounts that exhibited this signal

confidence.description: Confidence score (0-1) that this signal is predictive of churn vs. noise

warning_signals.description: Cross-account warning signals ranked by predictive reliability

total.description: Total number of churned accounts analyzed

likely_preventable.description: Number of churned accounts where churn was likely preventable

pct_preventable.description: Percentage of churn that was likely preventable

intervention.description: Recommended intervention that could have prevented churn (e.g., 'Executive sponsor check-in within 30 days of champion departure')

accounts_affected.description: Number of accounts this intervention could have saved

estimated_arr_saved.description: Estimated ARR that could have been saved with this intervention (null if revenue data unavailable)

top_interventions.description: Highest-impact interventions that would have prevented the most churn

preventable_churn.description: Assessment of how much churn was preventable and what would have helped
